_meta: Curated CWE -> detection/hunt/mitigation knowledge base for SYNAPSE Defender view. Maps weakness classes to ATT&CK techniques, hunt logic, and mitigating controls. Extend freely.

CWE-502.detection_guidance: Alert on application/server processes spawning shells (cmd.exe, /bin/sh, powershell) shortly after deserialization endpoints are hit. Watch for unexpected child processes of Java/.NET/app-server runtimes.
mitigations: Patch to fixed version; disable risky deserialization, use allow-list type filtering

CWE-20.detection_guidance: Baseline normal request shapes for the affected endpoint; alert on anomalous payload sizes, encodings, and parameter values. Correlate WAF blocks with successful 200s on the same path.
hunt_queries: waf.action='block' followed_by http.status IN (200,500) same src_ip within 5m
mitigations: Virtual-patch via WAF rule until vendor patch applied

CWE-78.detection_guidance: Detect web/app service accounts executing shell commands, especially recon (whoami, id, ifconfig) or download utilities (curl, wget, certutil).
mitigations: Run app under least-privilege service account

CWE-22.detection_guidance: Alert on '../' sequences, absolute paths, or encoded traversal in URL/params; watch for web process reading sensitive files (/etc/passwd, web.config, .env).

CWE-287.detection_guidance: Hunt for auth-bypass: successful access to privileged routes without a preceding successful login event; admin actions from never-before-seen sessions/IPs.
hunt_queries: url.path MATCHES '/admin|/api/.*/config' AND NOT preceded_by auth.success same_session
auth.privileged_action=true AND src_ip NOT IN known_admin_ips
mitigations: M1030 Network Segmentation for admin planes

CWE-416.detection_guidance: Memory-corruption exploitation is hard to signature; rely on EDR exploit-protection telemetry (ROP/heap-spray), crashes followed by anomalous child processes, and post-exploit behavior.
hunt_queries: edr.exploit_guard_event=true OR process.crash followed_by process.spawn same_parent within 60s
mitigations: Patch promptly — exploitation is behavioral, not signature-friendly

CWE-918.detection_guidance: Detect server making outbound requests to internal/metadata ranges (169.254.169.254, 10.0.0.0/8, link-local) driven by user-supplied URLs.
hunt_queries: src=app_servers AND dst IN ('169.254.169.254','10.0.0.0/8','127.0.0.0/8') AND triggered_by user_input

CWE-94.detection_guidance: Watch for new/modified script files in web roots (web shells), and interpreter processes evaluating dynamic input.
hunt_queries: file.create IN (webroot_paths) AND file.ext IN ('.php','.jsp','.aspx','.asp') AND NOT by deploy_pipeline

default.weakness: Generic exploitation of a public-facing application
default.detection_guidance: Monitor the affected service for anomalous requests, new outbound connections, unexpected child processes, and new files in writable paths. Correlate vendor IoCs with EDR/SIEM telemetry.
hunt_queries: new outbound connection from affected_service to rare external destination
